title: UK-Switzerland Financial Dialogue: Joint Statements
body: "This is a collection of the Joint Statements from the annual UK-Switzerland Financial Dialogues held between HM Treasury and the State Secretariat for International Finance and representatives from their respective supervisory authorities. These documents are released following the dialogues and summarise what was discussed and the key outcomes. The Financial Dialogue in 2024 was the first Financial Dialogue since 2020. This is because the dialogues were paused during negotiation of the Berne Financial Services Agreement from 2021 until 2023. There are no public Joint Statements for the first three Financial Dialogues from 2016 to 2018. "
